    • Uses of AdaptationActionResult in tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.core

      Methods in tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.core that return AdaptationActionResult 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      AdaptationActionResult IAdaptationAction.perform()
      Performs the adaptation action.
      AdaptationActionResult IAdaptationAction.rollback()
      Rolls back the adaptation action if possible.

      static AdaptationActionResult AdaptationActionResult.valueOf​(String name)
